title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.682 - Secretary to be appointed, duties
text:
217.682.  Secretary to be appointed, duties. — The board shall appoint a secretary who shall serve at the pleasure of the board.  It shall be the duty of the secretary to keep a full and true record of all books, documents and papers ordered filed and of all orders made, approved and confirmed by it.  It shall be the responsibility of the secretary to provide administrative assistance to the board as it deems appropriate and necessary to carry out the goals of the board.
(L. 1989 H.B. 408 § 4)
